mapper.select:
SELECT S.SCHD_NO, S.EMP_NO, E.EMP_NM, S.REF_POST_NO, S.SCHD_DIV_CD, S.SCHD_TITLE, S.SCHD_CN, S.SCHD_ST_DTM, S.SCHD_ED_DTM, S.ALL_DAY_YN, S.DEL_YN, S.REG_DTM, S.COLOR, S.SCHD_PRIO FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN EMP E ON S.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO WHERE S.DEL_YN = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT AL.APRV_NO AS SCHD_NO, A.EMP_NO AS EMP_NO, A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM AS EMP_NM, NULL AS REF_POST_NO, 'VACATION' AS SCHD_DIV_CD, AL.LEAVE_TYPE_CD AS SCHD_TITLE, AL.REASON AS SCHD_CN, AL.START_DTM AS SCHD_ST_DTM, AL.END_DTM AS SCHD_ED_DTM, 'Y' AS ALL_DAY_YN, 'N' AS DEL_YN, NULL AS REG_DTM, '#dd6b20' AS COLOR, 2 AS SCHD_PRIO FROM APRV_LEAVE AL JOIN APRV_DOC A ON AL.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO WHERE A.STAT_CD IN ('APPROVED', 'COMPLETED')
ORDER BY SCHD_ST_DTM
